content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Dream Creations International : Content Producer & Platform Manager (Part-Time/Remote) Anywhere in the World New South Wales Digital Marketing, Marketing, PR Strategy, Problem Solving, Research and Analysis, Strategic Thinking, Video Production, Content Writing, Multitasking, Social Media Management, Content Creation, Strategic Planning, Content Strategy, Team Management, Communication Skills, Storytelling, Content Planning, and Social Media Content All Other Remote Contract <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/4982/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Sydney <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://daizygedeon.com/">https://daizygedeon.com/</a> </p> <p class="MsoNormal"><span><strong>Reel Talk </strong>is a fast-growing independent podcast dedicated to honest, rigorous coverage of geopolitics, the Middle East and international affairs. At a time when independent journalism has never mattered more, Reel Talk is part of a growing global conversation — and our audience reflects that.&nbsp;</span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><span>As our audience expands, we are looking for a talented, versatile Content Producer and Platform Manager to work closely and confidentially with the host as her editorial partner -&nbsp;researching guests, briefing her ahead of interviews and helping shape the direction of the show. You will take ownership of production, platform management, research and team coordination. You will free her to do what she does best: think, create and speak.&nbsp;</span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><span>The ideal candidate is someone who prefers to work behind the scenes, believes deeply in the power of independent journalism and is passionate about humanity and world affairs — particularly the Middle East and international relations.</span></p> <div> <div> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong><span>About the Role</span></strong></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><span>This is a broad, hands-on role for someone who loves independent media and thrives without micromanagement. You will work closely with the host to keep the podcast running smoothly, the platforms growing and the content sharp.</span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><span>You are someone who gets things done quietly and brilliantly — without needing the spotlight yourself.</span></p> </div> </div> <div> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong><span>You Will Be Responsible For</span></strong></p> </div> <p class="MsoNormal"><span>→<span>&nbsp; </span>End-to-end podcast production — scheduling, research, briefing, recording coordination and post-production management</span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><span>→<span>&nbsp; </span>Write episode notes, interview briefs and research summaries</span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><span>→<span>&nbsp; </span>Manage and grow social media platforms including Instagram, Facebook, YouTube&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; </span><span>→<span>&nbsp; </span>Write captions, scripts and copy across all platforms in the host's voice</span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><span>→<span>&nbsp; </span>Coordinate social media shorts, clips and content grabs from episodes</span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><span>→<span>&nbsp; </span>Develop and manage a consistent content calendar with social media manager</span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><span>→</span><span>&nbsp;&nbsp;</span><span>Identify guest opportunities, story angles and trending topics in geopolitics and world affairs</span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><span>→&nbsp;&nbsp;Coordinating a small team of comprising video editor, designer, translator, social media manager, engagement manager and web developer.</span></p> <div> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong><span>You Are</span></strong></p> </div> <p class="MsoNormal"><span>→<span>&nbsp; </span>A strong writer with a journalism, editorial, TV production, or content background</span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><span>→<span>&nbsp; </span>Experience in podcast or broadcast media production</span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><span>→<span>&nbsp; </span>Experience managing social media platforms professionally</span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><span>→<span>&nbsp; </span>Genuinely interested in geopolitics, world affairs and the Middle East</span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><span>→<span>&nbsp; </span>Highly organised and self-directed — you own your work</span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><span>→<span>&nbsp; </span>A behind-the-scenes personality — motivated by the work, not the spotlight</span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><span>→<span>&nbsp; </span>Comfortable working remotely and communicating asynchronously</span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><span>→<span>&nbsp; </span>Reliable, discreet and deeply trustworthy</span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><span>→<span>&nbsp; </span>Arabic language skills an advantage but not essential</span></p> <div> <p class="MsoNormal"><strong><span>How to Apply</span></strong></p> </div> <p class="MsoNormal"><span>Please send the following to <strong>daizy@dreamcreationsintl.com</strong></span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><span>→<span>&nbsp; </span>Your CV</span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><span>→<span>&nbsp; </span>A cover letter outlining your editorial background, your interest in world affairs and geopolitics and why this role appeals to you</span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><span>→<span>&nbsp; </span>A portfolio of your work — writing samples, content you have produced, platforms you have managed or any other relevant material</span></p> <p class="MsoNormal"><span>**We read every application carefully. Incomplete applications will not be considered.</span></p> <div> <p>&nbsp;</p> </div> <div> <p>&nbsp;</p> </div> <div> <p>&nbsp;</p> </div> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/dream-creations-international-content-producer-platform-manager-part-time-remote">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/dream-creations-international-content-producer-platform-manager-part-time-remote</a></p> Tue, 28 Apr 2026 06:24:51 +0000 Thu, 28 May 2026 06:24:51 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/dream-creations-international-content-producer-platform-manager-part-time-remote https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/dream-creations-international-content-producer-platform-manager-part-time-remote comparis.ch: Backend Engineer, 80-100% (f/m/x) Anywhere in the World 🇦🇱 Albania, 🇧🇦 Bosnia and Herzegovina, 🇨🇿 Czechia
